headline: Why Is Humana (HUM) Down 8.5% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Humana (HUM) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: What are the four new companies being added to the S&P 500 index in March?
summary: S&P Global announced that four companies will join the S&P 500 index as part of its quarterly rebalance. The additions highlight the rising importance of AI infrastructure within the leading US equity benchmark.View on euronews
